---
title: Counting
description: Factorials and combinations.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Compute factorials.
- Compute combinations.
- Use counting before probability.
:::

```{python}
from edumath.probability.distributions import combinations, factorial

factorial(5), combinations(5, 2)
```

::: {.practice-box}
1. Compute `4!`.
2. Compute `C(6, 2)`.
3. Why does order matter in permutations but not combinations?
:::
